title: ilex tenuis
intro: Ilex tenuis, also known as the Madeira holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is rich in alkaloids, including ilicines and caffeic acid, which contribute to its medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex tenuis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
